description: Classifies a terminal error and suggests a likely fix. Read-only — produces a structured suggestion, never applies it.

inputs.name: output
inputs.description: Tail of terminal output that triggered the sensor (last ~4KB).

inputs.name: matches
inputs.description: Regex patterns from terminal_error sensor that matched.

outputs.name: category
outputs.description: High-level error family: npm | python | git | docker | port-in-use | permission | network | disk | generic.

outputs.name: suggestedFix
outputs.description: Concrete next-step suggestion (e.g. an exact shell command).

outputs.name: confidence
outputs.description: 0..1 — how sure we are about the classification.

outputs.name: safeToAutoFix
outputs.description: True iff the suggested fix is reversible enough to run without approval (rare — most are false).
